title.purpose: Panel headers, section headings, dialog titles.

body.purpose: Descriptions, annotation text, file names. 14px workhorse.

label.purpose: Buttons, nav items, sidebar row text. 12px dominant size.

micro.purpose: Badges, timestamps, match counts, page numbers. 10px.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: ToolCards and file list items at rest.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: ToolCards on hover, paired with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Command palette, modal dialogs. Significant interruptions only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single main action per surface. Amber background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #d97706; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b45309; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #d97706, 0 0 0 4px rgba(217,119,6,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button (Dark)
components.description: Toolbar and panel icon/text buttons inside the dark viewer.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost-dark"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"/></svg> Search</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost-dark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #a8a29e; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost-dark:hover { background: #3c3836; color: #fafaf9; } .ds-btn-ghost-dark:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217,119,6,0.5); }

components.name: Tool Card
components.description: Home screen tool grid entries. Rises on hover.
components.css: .ds-tool-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-tool-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #d6d3d1; } .ds-tool-card:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(217,119,6,0.5); } .ds-tool-card-icon { background: #d97706; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-tool-card-title { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1c1917; letter-spacing: -0.01em; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-tool-card:hover .ds-tool-card-title { color: #d97706; } .ds-tool-card-desc { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: #78716c; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Search Bar (Dark)
components.description: Ctrl+F inline search bar in the dark viewer. Compact pill form.
components.html: 3 / 12
components.css: .ds-searchbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #1c1917; border: 1px solid #57534e; border-radius: 12px; padding: 6px 10px; max-width: 320px; } .ds-searchbar:focus-within { border-color: #d97706; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(217,119,6,0.3); } .ds-searchbar-input { background: transparent; border: none; color: #fafaf9; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0; outline: none; } .ds-searchbar-input::placeholder { color: #57534e; } .ds-searchbar-count { color: #a8a29e; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; white-space: nowrap; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

components.name: Panel Row (Dark)
components.description: Annotation, bookmark, and outline panel list rows.
components.html: HighlightThe shift signals mode changep. 3
components.css: .ds-panel-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-panel-row:hover { background: #3c3836; } .ds-panel-row-type { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; color: #d97706; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-panel-row-text { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #a8a29e; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-panel-row-meta { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; color: #57534e; white-space: nowrap; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Command Palette
components.description: Ctrl+Shift+P fuzzy launcher. Dark overlay centered on screen.
components.html:
AnnotateHighlight selectionH
ViewToggle annotations panel⌃/
components.css: .ds-palette { background: rgba(28,25,23,0.96); border: 1px solid #3c3836; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.5); width: 100%; max-width: 480px; overflow: hidden; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .ds-palette-input-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #3c3836; } .ds-palette-input { background: transparent; border: none; color: #fafaf9; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; flex: 1; outline: none; } .ds-palette-input::placeholder { color: #57534e; } .ds-palette-result { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 80ms; } .ds-palette-result:hover, .ds-palette-result--active { background: #3c3836; } .ds-palette-result-cat { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; color: #d97706; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; width: 72px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-palette-result-label { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #fafaf9; flex: 1; } .ds-palette-result-kb { font-family: ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; color: #a8a29e; background: #292524; border: 1px solid #57534e; border-radius: 4px; padding: 1px 5px; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview:
This system is precision-built to be used, not admired. Every surface serves a function. When the user is working, the UI should be invisible; when they look closely, there is quiet craft.

The design operates in two intentional modes: light toolbox (home screen, tool pages, utilities) and dark viewer (document review, annotation, search). The shift between them is not inconsistency, it is mode-signaling. Light means: choose a tool, organize, prepare. Dark means: you are inside the document now.

The warm stone palette replaces the legacy blue-tinted Tailwind gray scale. The shift is subtle but perceptible: warmer dark surfaces feel more like a reading environment than a terminal, and warmer light surfaces feel like paper rather than a browser. The amber accent echoes annotation ink, highlighter yellow, and the warmth of physical document work.
keyCharacteristics: Two-mode contrast: light toolbox + dark deep-work viewer
Dense, information-first type scale centered on 12-14px
Warm stone palette, amber accent, no blue-tinted neutrals
Restrained shadows — flat at rest, depth only on state
Tight, purposeful spacing; no padding for its own sake

rules.name: The Amber Reserve Rule
rules.body: The amber accent covers less than 10% of any screen surface. Its presence signals interactivity or the currently active state. If it appears everywhere, it signals nothing.

rules.name: The Warm-Not-Blue Rule
rules.body: Every neutral value is tinted warm (hue ~65-70 OKLCH, chroma 0.003-0.012). No pure grays, no blue-gray Tailwind defaults (gray-900 is #111827, forbidden). Any new neutral must pass a warmth check.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, float, focus). A shadow on a static element is a design error.

rules.name: The No-Dark-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Dark surfaces do not use shadows for depth. Layering is tonal: lighter L% value = higher layer. Shadow-on-dark obscures content and creates a muddy feel.

rules.name: The Document Deference Rule
rules.body: The UI type scale stops at 16px. Anything larger is reserved for the document itself. The UI must never visually compete with the content it serves.

rules.name: The Label-Dominant Rule
rules.body: 12px is the primary working size. Design for 12px first. Never design for 16px and scale down.

dos: Do use amber-warm (#d97706) as the sole accent, sparingly.
Do use warm stone neutrals for all dark values. The warmth is the system's character.
Do keep the two-mode contrast: light toolbox, dark viewer.
Do use resting-card shadow only on cards on a light background.
Do keep interactive hit areas at minimum 28px height.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: reduce with duration-0 transitions.
Do test every focus state at ring-2 ring-amber-warm/50.
donts: Don't use gray-900 (#111827) or any blue-tinted Tailwind gray as a dark surface.
Don't make the interface look like SmallPDF or iLovePDF.
Don't produce an AI-generated-looking interface: no identical card grids, no gradient text, no glassmorphism-as-default.
Don't use border-left or border-right as colored accent stripes, except the one 2px left edge on selected navigation rows.
Don't add shadows to dark surface elements that aren't floating.
Don't use font-bold in running UI text. font-semibold is the maximum.
Don't add padding for breathing room without a specific reason.
Don't reach for a modal as a first thought.
